userMessage: Build a workflow that checks an RSS feed every hour and posts new items to a Slack channel.
rationale: Regression gate for the agent-builder port into Instance AI. A plain workflow-building prompt must route through the workflow-builder skill and must never load the agent-builder skill or invoke the agent_builder router tool. Meaningful in both module modes; the strongest signal is a run with N8N_ENABLED_MODULES including 'agents', where the agent-builder skill is in the catalog and the agent_builder router is registered (eagerly, since discovery disables deferred tools) yet must still not be selected.
